system.flavor: As you weave around your foes, tiny nicks with needles or blades blossom into stinging death.
system.effect:
Area effect a line 4 area, then dash to the end, or as far as possible, with phasing. Then end your turn.
• The first foe you pass through during this movement is blinded.
• All bloodied foes then have all their statuses increased by +1. Foes in crisis have their statuses increased by 2.
Afflicted foes take 2 damage. Foes with 3 or more negative status tokens take 2 piercing damage instead.
